caribbean.headline: Calm Seas Ahead
caribbean.paragraph: San Juan is experiencing a 27% rain probability with max wind forecast of 0 kt and wave heights of 3.5 ft. St. Thomas has a similar forecast with 0 kt winds and less than 10% rain probability, making for a calm day in the Eastern Caribbean ports.

mediterranean.headline: Calm Mediterranean Seas
mediterranean.paragraph: Mykonos is experiencing less than 10% rain probability with max wave heights of 5.6 ft and dominant swell direction from the NNE. Haifa is also seeing calm conditions with 0 kt winds and less than 10% rain probability, similar to Mykonos, with no significant weather impacts expected in the Eastern Mediterranean today.
